name: degoog-pepper
description: Plugin store for degoog — a self-hosted customizable search engine
author: Peppershade

plugins.name: Outline Knowledge Base
plugins.description: Search your Outline knowledge base from the degoog search bar. Provides a !kb bang command and an inline slot panel that surfaces relevant articles alongside web results.

plugins.name: Keycloak OIDC
plugins.description: Gate degoog Settings with Keycloak OIDC and show an authenticated user chip next to the settings icon.
